responses:
theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 (A := A) → P1 (A := A) :=
by
  intro hA
  exact hA.trans (interior_subset _)

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro h
  exact h.trans (interior_subset _)

theorem interior_inter_subset {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] (A B : Set X) :
    interior (A ∩ B) ⊆ interior A ∩ interior B := by
  intro x hx
  have hxA : x ∈ interior A :=
    (interior_mono (inter_subset_left)) hx
  have hxB : x ∈ interior B :=
    (interior_mono (inter_subset_right)) hx
  exact And.intro hxA hxB

theorem Topology.P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A : Set X) → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro h
  have h₂ : interior (closure (interior (A : Set X))) ⊆ closure (interior A) :=
    interior_subset
  exact Set.Subset.trans h h₂
